title: Recommended Approach for Preventing Duplicate Litify Intakes
description:

The client is reviewing webform submissions and noticed that some users appear to be creating multiple intakes in Litify from duplicate submissions. 

Keith confirmed in the email thread that there is currently nothing preventing duplicate submissions from triggering the Litify webhook. He suggested three potential approaches:

title: Litify Discussion
description:
Hi!

Trudy has requested a time to discuss forms on the Sink Law site. She's hoping to have a conversation sometime this week. She said it looks like leads are being passed into Litify with "website brand"/"website"/"website non-brand" when someone fills out a form, and she'd like to change this to better reflect the advertising source. She's looking for guidance in how to get that done.

Is this something we can assist her with? Do we have time this week to hop on a call with h

title: Banner Triggers
description:
Dropping this in as a discussion:

Trudy sent in an email to me about the banner not toggling on after Chris sorted her out earlier this morning. She's asking if they need to adjust the time the banner goes live, as this will be occurring on a monthly basis.

I feel like maybe it's time to look into how we can implement a timed banner trigger so we're not having to manually put the banner up and take it down. Can we look into that?
